# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Middleware for Next.js that implements authentication. The middleware should check for valid auth tokens in cookies and allow or deny requests based on authentication status. Handle both authenticated and unauthenticated cases appropriately.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { Request, Response } from 'next';

const authMiddleware = async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  const cookieAuthToken = req.cookies['auth-token'];
  if (!cookieAuthToken) {
    // Unauthenticated case
    res.status(401).json({ message: 'Invalid authentication token' });
  } else {
    // Authenticated case
    // Do something with the auth token here, e.g. validate it with a database
    const isValidToken = await verifyAuthToken(cookieAuthToken);
    if (isValidToken) {
      res.locals.authUserId = getUserIdFromToken(cookieAuthToken);
      next();
    } else {
      res.status(401).json({ message: 'Invalid authentication token' });
    }
  }
};

export default authMiddleware;
